plan_metadata.name: DA new-api api-key js happy path
plan_metadata.description: DA new-api api-key js happy path

steps.description: Click the "Declarative Agent" option in the "New Project" dialog within Visual Studio Code's Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension.
Click the "Create a declarative agent with an action" option in the dropdown menu under "Add an action to your declarative agent" in the "Create Declarative Agent" dialog of Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Start with a New API" option in the "Create an Action" dropdown menu within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension panel in Visual Studio Code.
Click the "API Key" option in the "Authentication Type" dropdown within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension of Visual Studio Code.
Click the "JavaScript" option in the "Programming Language" dropdown menu within the Visual Studio Code interface.
Click the "Default folder: /home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects" option in the workspace folder selection dropdown in Visual Studio Code.

@code run "npm run keygen" at  #text:/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects/${{var:app_name}} . fillin the generated api value into file: #text:/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects/${{var:app_name}}/env/.env.dev.user and #text:/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects/${{var:app_name}}/env/.env.local.user, replace SECRET_API_KEY= '  ' with the new value and save the file.
Click the ".env.dev" file in the "env" folder within the VSCode Explorer sidebar to open it.
